issue_title: fix(website): remove unnecessary padding around avatar
issue_body_preview: My solution to the unnecessary padding issue. I kept some of the original button padding to maintain better accessibility when clicking the avatar, but offset it with an extra wrapper div to remove the visual extra space. Desktop view:
test_description_zh: 访问网站首页，观察顶部导航栏中用户头像（Avatar）组件周围的间距，检查头像与相邻元素之间是否存在多余的空白区域，并点击头像测试交互可用性。
expected_result_zh: 用户头像周围无多余的视觉空白/内边距，头像紧凑地显示在导航栏中，整体视觉效果无异常间距；点击头像时可点击区域仍保持合理大小，交互正常响应。
